testcase.name: test_needs_count_increments_on_create
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_notifications.py:155: in test_needs_count_increments_on_create assert create_response.status_code == 201, f"Failed to create need: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Failed to create need: {"success":true,"need":{"id":"76dd9e09-850d-4b36-9a58-325455da681e","location":"autres","description":"TEST_NOTIF_Need for testing","items":[],"quantity":1.0,"unit_price":0,"amount":0,"supplier":null,"urgency":"normale","notes":"","requested_by":"Test User","status":"en_attente","created_at":"2026-04-22T18:15:04.730708+00:00"}} E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_needs_count_decrements_on_delete
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_notifications.py:179: in test_needs_count_decrements_on_delete assert create_response.status_code == 201 E assert 200 == 201 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
